product_categories.description: Complete residential roof mount systems and kits for asphalt shingle, tile, and metal roofs.
Commercial racking solutions including flat-roof ballasted and attached systems.
Structural rails and rail accessories for pitched-roof and flat-roof mounting.
Wire management, hardware, grounding, and other balance-of-system components.
Clips, ties, and channels for managing PV wiring and home runs.

product_reviews.title: Clean layout and easy install
product_reviews.body: Used this 12-panel XR100 kit on a comp shingle re-roof. All hardware was in the box, rails cut nicely, and the layout guide matched our design almost exactly.

product_reviews.title: Great value kit for small resi jobs
product_reviews.body: We keep a few of these 12-module kits on the shelf for quick-turn projects. Pricing is competitive and engineering covers our local wind and snow loads.

product_reviews.title: Solid kit, minor rail overage
product_reviews.body: Kit worked well for a 12x1 landscape array. We had a bit of extra rail left over, but thats better than running short. Would buy again.

product_reviews.title: Good instructions and hardware
product_reviews.body: Instructions are clear and our crew appreciated the labeled bags. Would like a slightly better rail splice illustration, but overall very good.

product_reviews.title: Our go-to 10�b0 ballast system
product_reviews.body: Used on multiple 200 kW+ flat-roof projects. Ballast charts are easy to follow and the install sequence is straightforward for our crews.

product_reviews.title: Fast layout, strong engineering support
product_reviews.body: Engineering package covered 140 mph wind in coastal county without issues. Ballast blocks were reasonable and layout tool export was clean.

product_reviews.title: Good for large arrays
product_reviews.body: System is modular and scales well. Palletization could be a bit better labeled, but once sorted it�19s very quick to stage and install.

product_reviews.title: Installer friendly
product_reviews.body: Crews like the pre-assembled hardware and integrated wire management. A little learning curve on the first job but smooth after that.

product_reviews.title: Great support for value engineering
product_reviews.body: Manufacturer helped us re-optimize ballast to stay under structural limits. System still met 140 mph wind and 30 psf snow requirements.

product_reviews.title: Low-profile and clean
product_reviews.body: Nice option where height is limited. Slightly more ballast than expected but still within structural allowance.

product_reviews.title: Works well on tight roofs
product_reviews.body: We used this on a small medical office with a lot of obstructions. Layout flexibility was good, just plan extra time for ballast layout.

product_reviews.title: Fine but heavier than expected
product_reviews.body: System installs fine but ballast requirements were higher than a competing product on one project. Still a decent choice.

product_reviews.title: Best wire clip we�19ve used
product_reviews.body: Snaps onto the rail securely and holds multiple PV wires without pinching. Great for keeping arrays tidy.

product_reviews.title: Fast, clean wire management
product_reviews.body: We switched from zip ties to these clips on most installs. Saves time and looks much more professional.

product_reviews.title: Perfect for home runs
product_reviews.body: We use the 1-inch channel to keep home runs and MLPE leads organized on commercial roofs. Adhesive backing has held up well.

product_reviews.title: Good product, order extra clips
product_reviews.body: Channel works as advertised. We recommend ordering a few extra end caps and clips for future service work.

product_reviews.title: Strong rail for most residential jobs
product_reviews.body: XR100 is our default rail for pitched roofs. Good span capability and easy splices keep labor down.

product_reviews.title: Lightweight option for low loads
product_reviews.body: Nice lightweight profile for low snow areas. Just verify spans carefully on higher wind sites.

product_reviews.title: Beefy rail for extreme conditions
product_reviews.body: We use XR1000 in hurricane and heavy snow markets. Span tables are generous and deflection is minimal even at higher loads.

products.name: XR100 12-Panel Rail-Based Roof Mount Kit
products.short_description: Complete 12-module XR100 rail-based kit for asphalt shingle roofs.
products.description: Pre-engineered 12-panel residential kit using XR100 rails, compatible with most 60- and 72-cell modules in landscape. Includes rails, splices, roof attachments, mid and end clamps, and hardware optimized for asphalt shingle roofs with up to 140 mph wind and 30 psf snow loads.

products.name: RL10 12-Panel Rail-Less Roof Mount Kit
products.short_description: 12-module rail-less mounting kit for asphalt shingle roofs.
products.description: Low-profile rail-less kit for 12 modules on asphalt shingle roofs. Includes deck-mounted flashing, module clamps with integrated grounding, and layout guidance for typical 6x2 or 4x3 arrays. Ideal for installers seeking reduced material volume and faster staging.

products.name: XR100 16-Panel Rail-Based Roof Mount Kit
products.short_description: XR100 rail-based kit for 16-module residential arrays.
products.description: Scalable 16-panel kit using XR100 rails for high-reliability residential installations. Supports portrait or landscape layouts across two or more rows and is compatible with optional tile hooks for concrete tile roofs.

products.name: FlatMax 10° Ballasted Flat-Roof System
products.short_description: 10° ballasted flat-roof system for medium and large commercial arrays.
products.description: Modular 10° ballasted racking system for commercial flat roofs. Optimized for high-density layouts with minimal roof penetrations. Includes integrated wire management, shared ballast pans, and comprehensive engineering for up to 150 mph wind and 40 psf snow loads.

products.name: FlatMax 5° Ballasted Flat-Roof System
products.short_description: Low-profile 5° ballasted solution for flat commercial roofs.
products.description: Low-tilt 5° variant of the FlatMax system for rooftops with strict height limits or high-exposure conditions. Engineered for 140 mph wind and 30 psf snow loads with optimized ballast layouts for a wide range of roof structures.

products.name: XR100 Rail
products.short_description: High-strength rail profile for most residential pitched-roof arrays.
products.description: XR100 is a robust, general-purpose rail designed for standard residential spans. It supports long rail runs with minimal deflection and is compatible with a full ecosystem of clamps, splices, and accessories for shingle, tile, and metal roofs.

products.name: XR10 Rail
products.short_description: Lightweight rail profile for low-snow residential markets.
products.description: XR10 is a slim, lightweight rail ideal for regions with moderate design loads. It reduces material and shipping weight while still meeting structural requirements up to 140 mph wind and 30 psf snow when installed per span tables.

products.name: XR1000 Rail
products.short_description: Heavy-duty rail for extreme wind and snow conditions.
products.description: XR1000 is a high-capacity rail profile engineered for hurricane-prone and heavy-snow markets. It supports long spans, high loads, and is commonly used on challenging residential and commercial pitched roofs.

products.name: Q-Click Rail-Mounted Wire Clip
products.short_description: Stainless steel clip for routing PV wires along rail flanges.
products.description: Spring steel clip that snaps onto XR-series rails and similar profiles to secure PV conductors without damaging insulation. Holds multiple wires and is rated for outdoor UV exposure. Ideal for tidy, code-compliant wire management.

products.name: 1" Low-Profile PV Wire Channel
products.short_description: Adhesive-backed 1" wire channel for rooftop cable routing.
products.description: UV-stable plastic wire channel with removable cover for routing home runs and MLPE leads across rooftops. Compatible with common roofing membranes and includes stainless hardware options for mechanical fastening.

products.name: EdgeGuard Mini Wire Clip
products.short_description: Mini clip for securing PV wires to module frame edges.
products.description: Compact polymer clip that locks onto module frame flanges to route PV wires at array edges. Designed to reduce wire sag and chafing, and compatible with a wide range of module frame thicknesses.

products.name: Adjustable Tile Hook for Concrete Tile Roofs
products.short_description: Height-adjustable tile hook for concrete tile roofs.
products.description: Stainless steel adjustable tile hook designed for use with XR rails on concrete tile roofs. Provides vertical and lateral adjustability to accommodate varied batten heights and tile profiles, supporting high wind and snow applications.

products.name: 9x12 Aluminum Flashing for Shingle Roofs
products.short_description: 9" x 12" aluminum flashing for lag-bolt roof attachments.
products.description: Low-profile, 9x12 aluminum flashing for use with deck-mounted roof attachments on asphalt shingle roofs. Compatible with common lag-bolt mounts and designed for long-term weather resistance.

products.name: Universal Bonding Lug Kit
products.short_description: Bonding lug with hardware for equipment grounding.
products.description: UL-listed bonding lug kit for terminating equipment grounding conductors on rail-based systems. Includes t-bolt, serrated flange nut, and lug body compatible with XR and many third-party rails.

products.name: Universal Mid Clamp 40 mm – Black
products.short_description: Black anodized mid clamp for 40 mm module frames.
products.description: Universal mid clamp with integrated bonding washer for 40 mm PV module frames. Compatible with XR rails and most similar profiles. Black anodized finish blends with frame and rail for a clean aesthetic.

products.name: Universal End Clamp 40 mm – Black
products.short_description: Black anodized end clamp for 40 mm module frames.
products.description: Universal end clamp for securing outer module edges on XR rails and compatible profiles. Features integrated bonding and a black anodized finish for seamless aesthetics on residential arrays.

products.name: Online Array Configurator Tool
products.short_description: Web-based tool for configuring arrays and generating bills of materials.
products.description: Browser-based configurator for designing residential and light commercial PV arrays. Supports rail-based and ballasted systems, multiple roof types, and exports a complete bill of materials directly to the shopping cart.
